title: Smith didn't mean to trivialize discrimination in remarks about unvaccinated, she says
author: Elise von Scheel
notes: Text article — Smith's 'most discriminated against group' statement (Oct 12 2022) and partial retraction/clarification. Resolves HOLD on R-072 (player URL). Anchors EVT-058. Key quote: 'They have been the most discriminated against group that I've ever witnessed in my lifetime.'
